<parameter=code>

        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nLeft frame:")
for n in after:
    if n['id'] == 1:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
